[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001001001 3
1 110100011 5
2 010110110 5
3 001111111 7
4 110101000 4
5 111001011 6
6 110101011 6
7 010110101 5

01 10 110111111 8
12 21 011111111 8
23 32 001111111 7 match 3
34 43 000110111 5
45 54 110110111 7
56 65 110111111 8
67 76 111101011 7
70 07 111101011 7

02 20 111111011 8
13 31 010110101 5 match 7
24 42 001111111 7 match 3
35 53 110110111 7
46 64 110111110 7
57 75 111111111 a
60 06 110101011 6 match 6
71 17 111111111 a

03 30 110111111 8
14 41 010110111 6
25 52 111111111 a
36 63 110111101 7
47 74 111111111 a
50 05 110111111 8
61 16 110111101 7
72 27 111011011 7

26 62 111111011 8
37 73 111111111 a
